name: plugins
description: Collection of Claude Code plugins for broadband protocols and development tooling

plugins.name: bbf-cwmp-usp
plugins.description: MCP server with semantic search, exact parameter lookup, and tree navigation over TR-181, TR-098, and USP specs

plugins.name: statusline-monitor
plugins.description: Context & usage monitor statusline showing model, active task, directory, context window, token counts, API usage limits, cost, and session duration
